scripts.backend:dev: cd backend && poetry run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8100
scripts.mobile:test: npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/pushLinks.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/pushOsNav.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/osTabNav.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/stageResolve.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/domain/projectHealth.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/domain/projectLifecycle.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/domain/resolveProjectProgress.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/domain/homePriority.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/expenseRowTarget.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/domain/stageRoomMatrix.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/domain/estimateFilters.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/domain/buildHomeKpiDetail.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/chatProjectFilter.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/formatPhone.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/chatAttention.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/domain/scheduleExecutionStats.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/legacyRoutes.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/domain/buildDecisionHistory.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/detailLevelPolicy.test.ts && npx tsx apps/mobile/constants/estimateLayers.test.ts && cd apps/mobile && npx tsx lib/breadcrumb.test.ts && npx tsx lib/domain/enrichProjectsPendingPayments.test.ts && npx tsx lib/domain/buildHomeMoreSummary.test.ts && npx tsx lib/domain/buildSetupChecklist.test.ts && npx tsx lib/domain/customerWorksFilters.test.ts && npx tsx lib/domain/resolveDynamicDock.test.ts && npx tsx lib/wizard/buildQuickWizardRooms.test.ts && npx tsx lib/wizard/buildMarketEstimateInsights.test.ts && npx tsx lib/domain/paymentHistory.test.ts && npx tsx lib/wizard/buildProjectCreatePayload.test.ts && npx tsx lib/domain/buildInboxItems.test.ts && npx tsx lib/approvalLinks.test.ts && npx tsx lib/domain/acceptancePending.test.ts && npx tsx lib/domain/buildUnifiedBudgetExpenses.test.ts && npx tsx lib/domain/budgetFactReconcile.test.ts && npx tsx lib/domain/buildStageExpenseLinks.test.ts && lib/domain/scratchpadLine.test.ts && npx tsx lib/stageEstimate.test.ts
scripts.e2e:api: npx playwright test -c e2e/playwright.config.ts e2e/project-lifecycle.spec.ts e2e/portal-documents.spec.ts e2e/contract-gate-path.spec.ts
scripts.e2e:ci: npm run e2e:api && npm run e2e:portal-ui && npm run e2e:contract-gate-ui
scripts.verify: npm run e2e:all && npm run e2e:playwright
scripts.test:guards: cd backend && .venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/test_environment_guards.py tests/test_acceptance_canon.py tests/test_cross_domain_notify.py tests/test_project_documents.py tests/test_document_media_acl.py tests/test_document_ocr.py tests/test_esign_providers.py tests/test_document_ocr_worker.py tests/test_notification_types.py tests/test_contract_gate_golden_path.py tests/test_contract_gate.py tests/test_estimate_lock.py tests/test_project_lifecycle.py -q
scripts.test:priority: npm run test:offline && npm run test:routes && npm run test:docs-meta && npm run test:docs-upload && npx tsx apps/mobile/lib/domain/projectLifecycle.test.ts && npm run testflight:eas && npm run test:guards
